title: One and the same
wikitext:
[]: One and the same             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Aug 25, 2005 10:36 pm That infamous sentence in the RCB, on the Rei Ayanami instance, which says "Their soul is one and the same" has important consequences. It can be understood that there's only one "Rei soul" at a given time (which means either Eva-00 soulless or Rei-002 soulless), and it would deny the possibility of soul copying. That's a way of understanding the line. I was never too sure about this, considering the strong evidence about Eva-00 having Rei-001's soul, and besides that I believe you can't say Rei-002 is soulless. So I went and checked the original . In that picture the red box is marking the sentence in question. It says: 魂は同一である。

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Aug 26, 2005 8:01 am AA, you just need to learn to wrap your mind around the notion of one soul existing in more than one place at a time. I myself have no problem whatsoever with the idea; it's a bit like accepting the Christian dogma of the Trinity, i.e. that God consist of Three Persons (the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit) and yet is One God. Remember, this is Lilith's soul we're talking about here, and there's plenty of evidence in EoE that she can manifest her existence in more than one place at a time...

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Aug 26, 2005 10:07 am Does Unit-00 even need a soul? There's ample evidence to suggest Rei is able to generate AT Fields on her own. Perhaps whatever of Rei I is within Unit-00 is only there to service as a link, amplifying Rei's inherant abilities through the Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Aug 26, 2005 10:34 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Does Unit-00 even need a soul? There's ample evidence to suggest Rei is able to generate AT Fields on her own.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Aug 26, 2005 12:55 pm Deleted.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Aug 26, 2005 1:04 pm Shin-Seiki wrote: This idea totally fails per Occams Razor...

[]:             Quote Post by sir_evangelist » Fri Aug 26, 2005 4:08 pm Lilith gave a part of her soul to humanity, as the 3rd impact shows. For that reason we can say that the soul division is factual. And for the ones that say that eva-00 doesnÂ´t has soul, in one episode Shinji and Rei change evas for an experiment. ShinjiÂ´s eva(00) got mad an went on bersek mode, and as we can see, eva 00 could move and punch the glasses, so it has a soul although Rei isnÂ´t on eva.And we donÂ´t have to forget about the last Rei that Shinji saw before the bersek.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Aug 26, 2005 4:14 pm I have no problem with soul multiplicity in Eva, not only with Rei's case, but also by extension to Kyouko's one. The thing is that single line on the RCB was the positive evidence that went against other evidence like Rei-001's soul in Eva-00. So I wanted to know if the line was translated correctly. Try talking about Rei's soul multiplicity on, for example, the EvaML, and you'll see what I mean. As for Occam's razor... well, that's the argument they always told me using that single quote: they had to go and invent all this process to fill in the gaps of denying Rei-001 on Eva-00. But at least that was Occam's razor to them, less initial suppositions, when considering the RCB line. No soul copying, and its consequences.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Fri Aug 26, 2005 5:40 pm AchtungAffen wrote: I have no problem with soul multiplicity in Eva, not only with Rei's case, but also by extension to Kyouko's one. The thing is that single line on the RCB was the positive evidence that went against other evidence like Rei-001's soul in Eva-00. So I wanted to know if the line was translated correctly. Try talking about Rei's soul multiplicity on, for example, the EvaML, and you'll see what I mean. As for Occam's razor... well, that's the argument they always told me using that single quote: they had to go and invent all this process to fill in the gaps of denying Rei-001 on Eva-00. But at least that was Occam's razor to them, less initial suppositions, when considering the RCB line. No soul copying, and its consequences.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Aug 26, 2005 7:02 pm From all the evidence pointing to Rei-001 in Eva-00, I'll point only one, but as I see it, one of the more convincing ones: In episode 14, during the cross-synch test while Shinji tries to synch with Eva-00 after they start the A^10 connection and just before it went berserk we see this image: The same image reappears as a talking character in #25 And the original scripts mark her as "Rei 1". So the image that showed up on #14 was no other than Rei-1. And this is only one of the arguments for her being the resident soul.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Aug 26, 2005 7:36 pm I presented the bones of the argument for consideration over on the trivialbeing forums .(scroll down a bit) A rather interesting theory on the nature of souls in Eva can be found here .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 28, 2005 5:32 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: A rather interesting theory on the nature of souls in Eva can be found here .

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Aug 28, 2005 5:59 pm That's good! I was asking about Rei's soul and zero-goki in another thread! I was thinking from months that Rei I is inside the zero-goki (but no-one want to believe me, I'm talink'about other forums), and there many hints about this. Well, finally I find other people that think about this like me!

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sun Aug 28, 2005 8:15 pm Hey Reichu, you know better Japanese than I do. What do you think about that "doitsu" part?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 28, 2005 9:21 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Hey Reichu, you know better Japanese than I do. What do you think about that "doitsu" part?
